actions.label: Observe public guidance text
actions.rationale: Reading visible public portal guidance does not advance an authenticated workflow.

actions.label: Sign In/Register
actions.rationale: Authentication must remain a manual user-attended boundary.

actions.label: Review visible status labels
actions.rationale: Observation can cite labels but must not store private case values.

actions.label: Upload corrections
actions.rationale: Uploading documents changes an official account-scoped workflow and requires attendance and exact confirmation.

actions.label: Submit application
actions.rationale: Submission is an official action that must be blocked by this rehearsal.

actions.label: Pay fees
actions.rationale: Payment is a financial workflow requiring separate user-attended guardrails.

actions.label: Schedule inspection
actions.rationale: Scheduling changes an official inspection workflow and is outside read-only observation.
